name: python3-django-environ
title: python3-django-environ
description:
Simplified environment variables for Django
Simplifies configuring key aspects of Django Applications through
environment variables. This package contains the Python3 version.

When validating lab setup, run `python3-django-environ --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
